meta.title: Contact — Book a Call or Send a Message
meta.description: Book a 15-minute call or send a message. A direct line to Jerrell, no middlemen. Gold Coast digital studio serving Queensland and Australia.

hero.heading: Let's talk.
hero.sub: Book a 15-minute call or send a message — either way, it comes straight to me. No call centres, no middlemen, no automated runaround.

book.heading: Book a 15-minute call
book.sub: Pick a time that suits you. We'll talk through your business, what's not working, and whether we're a good fit. No pitch.

message.heading: Prefer to write?
message.sub: Send a message and I'll get back to you within one business day.

responseCallout: 24-hour response, weekdays. You'll always hear back from a real person — me.

faq.question: Do you work with clients outside Queensland?
faq.answer: Yes. I'm based on the Gold Coast and most clients are in Queensland, but I work with businesses across Australia. Everything is handled remotely, with calls over Google Meet when we need face time.

faq.question: What happens on a discovery call?
faq.answer: It's a 15-minute, no-pressure conversation about your business, your goals, and what's not working. There's no pitch. If we're a good fit, the next step is a clear plan and a transparent quote. If we're not, I'll happily point you in the right direction.

faq.question: How quickly will you get back to me?
faq.answer: Within one business day, every time. You deal with me directly, so there's no queue and no account manager in between.
